core_mechanism: baseline-subtracted residual as the transfer signal: isolating the effect of an intervention by taking the difference between a post-intervention state and its pre-intervention reference, and using that difference (rather than the absolute post-intervention state) as the quantity to be matched/transferred
brief_reason: The method defines its supervisory 'delta signal' as the difference between the tuned teacher model and its untuned base model, thereby subtracting a reference to isolate and transfer only the change induced by the intervention.
